notes: This file is the release ledger for corpus document x conversion pathway quality.
A pathway result below its stored document baseline by document_regression_block_percent blocks release unless the baseline is corrected with review notes.
A pathway result above baseline by uplift_review_percent should be called out in release notes after the baseline is intentionally updated.
PyMuPDF, Poppler, RapidOCR, and PaddleOCR are allowed only as developer/reference pathways and must not ship in release locks or the packaged runtime without explicit promotion approval.
